title: Command Shortcuts
description: Easily execute commands directly from your inventory!
body:
This datapack allows you to execute any command of your liking just by right clicking an item!

**Using the "Command Shortcut" item**
1. Grant yourself the item: Run`/function shortcut:give`in chat
2. Right click the item
3. Enter a command of your liking (make sure to not include a `/` at the start of the command)
4. Press "Done" (Under no circumstance press "Sign" :3)
5. Right click to run the command!

**Disclaimers**
- This datapack only works in the **Snapshot 23w31** (and above once new versions get released)
- Command Shortcuts can currently only store one command, although this might change in future versions of the pack
